zh.Wellingore, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾維林格
zh.Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Sutton於大約1475年出生在英國林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯時，他的父親Hamon Sutton III22歲，母親Margaret Sheffield21歲。他於大約1508年與Elizabeth Boys在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1545年11月25日在英國林可爾史爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Sutton于大约1475年出生在英国林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯时，他的父亲Hamon Sutton III22岁，母亲Margaret Sheffield21岁。他于大约1508年与Elizabeth Boys在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1545年11月25日在英国林可爾史爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Sutton was born about 1475, in Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Hamon Sutton III, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Sheffield, was 21. He married Elizabeth Boys about 1508, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 25 November 1545, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Sutton est né environ 1475, à Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Hamon Sutton III, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sheffield, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Boys environ 1508, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1545, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Sutton um 1475 in Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamon Sutton III 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Sheffield 21. Er hat um 1508 in England Elizabeth Boys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 25. November 1545 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Sutton è nato il circa 1475 nel Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Hamon Sutton III, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Sheffield, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Boys circa 1508, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 25 novembre 1545, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Suttonが約1475年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブルトン ビー リンコルンで生まれた時，父Hamon Sutton IIIは22歳，母Margaret Sheffieldは21歳であった。約1508年にイギリスでElizabeth Boysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1545年11月25日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Sutton(이)가 대략 1475년 영국 링코실르 버턴 비 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon Sutton III(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Sheffield(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1508년 영국에서 Elizabeth Boys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1545년 11월 25일 영국 링코실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Sutton nasceu aproximadamente 1475, em Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamon Sutton III, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Sheffield, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Boys aproximadamente 1508, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1545, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Sutton родился около 1475 г. в местности буртон би линколн, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hamon Sutton III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sheffield, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Boys около 1508 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 25 ноября 1545 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Sutton nació aproximadamente 1475, en Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamon Sutton III, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Sheffield, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Boys aproximadamente 1508, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1545, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
